root.title: dummyindex
root.abstract: dummyindex: a persistent context engine that AST-extracts a repo into a navigable .context/ index and drives a planning/build/equip toolkit

children.title: dummyindex
children.abstract: Python package root: the deterministic pipeline, graph analysis/export, the .context/ engine, CLI dispatchers, installer, usage, and bundled skills

children.title: analysis
children.abstract: Pure graph analytics over pipeline output — Leiden community clustering of the symbol graph (cluster.py)

children.title: __init__.py
children.abstract: Package marker for graph analysis — exposes Leiden/Louvain community detection (`cluster`).

children.title: cluster.py
children.abstract: Community detection on NetworkX graphs: Leiden (graspologic) with Louvain fallback, splits oversized communities, scores cohesion.

children.title: cli
children.abstract: One wire-only dispatcher module per subcommand: parse argv, lazy-import a context.domains function, print/exit — no business logic

children.title: build_loop
children.abstract: CLI package for the build-loop subcommand — wave dispatch and checklist plumbing that needs private siblings (dispatch.py, waves.py)

children.title: __init__.py
children.abstract: `context build` CLI package: re-exports `run` from dispatch; split into dispatch (arg/check/status) + waves (next/next-wave).

children.title: dispatch.py
children.abstract: `context build` arg parsing + --check/--skip/--status verbs over a proposal's checklist.md; agent dispatch lives in the build skill.

children.title: waves.py
children.abstract: `build --next` / `--next-wave` handlers: print the unchecked dispatch frontier with per-item equipment mapping + grounding JSON.

children.title: equip
children.abstract: CLI package for the equip subcommand — verb dispatch, plugin discover/state, shared helpers for the project-tooling toolkit

children.title: __init__.py
children.abstract: `context equip` CLI package: re-exports run + project_slug; split into dispatch, verbs, discover, plugin_state, common.

children.title: common.py
children.abstract: Shared equip-subcommand plumbing: local flag parsing, root resolution, and the fresh-render set consumed by the apply/lifecycle verbs.

children.title: discover.py
children.abstract: `equip discover` / `equip install` CLI: the plugin-manager verbs — discovery I/O, match→plan, dry-run print, native settings wiring.

children.title: dispatch.py
children.abstract: `context equip <verb>` dispatcher: the apply / add-specialist paths plus the verb-surface routing (apply is an explicit verb).

children.title: plugin_state.py
children.abstract: Read-only Claude plugin-state readers + `equip verify` verb — resolves known marketplaces and confirms an install actually loaded.

children.title: verbs.py
children.abstract: Equip lifecycle + evolution verbs: hash-baselined status / refresh / reset / remove / uninstall and the patch seam (wire-only).

children.title: __init__.py
children.abstract: `context <subcommand>` dispatcher: maps each verb to a sibling module's run/run_<verb>, with scope/root resolution and -h interception.

children.title: audit.py
children.abstract: `context audit start|show` CLI: wire-only parse/resolve, hands off to the audit domain; panel debate lives in the audit skill.

children.title: bootstrap.py
children.abstract: `context bootstrap` CLI — regenerates only the managed CLAUDE.md block, refusing on unbalanced markers.

children.title: check.py
children.abstract: `context check` CLI: diff source hashes vs snapshotted manifest for drift; `--versions` reports cross-layer version skew (never auto-fixes).

children.title: common.py
children.abstract: Shared CLI plumbing: argument parsing + scope/root resolution (`resolve_context_root`) used by every subcommand.

children.title: config.py
children.abstract: `context config show` CLI — prints the per-repo config.json; reserves get/set for a future version with a clear rejection.

children.title: conventions.py
children.abstract: `context conventions-write` CLI — atomic markdown write of an agent-authored doc into conventions/<section>.md.

children.title: council.py
children.abstract: `context council-log` CLI: append a council-debate log row, plus a `backfill` subverb synthesizing entries for pre-convention artifacts.

children.title: council_batch.py
children.abstract: `context council-batch --next` CLI: the parallel-council frontier — emits per-feature dispatch units (role/subagent/framework) as JSON.

children.title: debt.py
children.abstract: `context debt` CLI: deterministically harvest TODO/FIXME/HACK/DEBT markers into a per-file markdown ledger (or JSON), optional --write.

children.title: dev_pick.py
children.abstract: `context dev-pick --feature ID` CLI: deterministic stack-aware author picker over a feature's files + repo dependency tokens.

children.title: doc_reorg.py
children.abstract: `context doc-reorg` CLI: gated safety net (guard/list/backup/restore) for in-place doc reorganisation; edits happen in-session.

children.title: enrich.py
children.abstract: `context enrich-plan` / `enrich-apply` CLI — builds the tree-node enrichment work-list and writes back authored abstracts.

children.title: features.py
children.abstract: `context features-*` CLI: rename/merge/flow-remove/section-write/scaffold-feature/assign-files ops over feature docs.

children.title: help.py
children.abstract: Help text for `context <subcommand>`: canonical USAGE block, sliced per-subcommand so help can't drift from the reference.

children.title: hooks.py
children.abstract: `context hooks` CLI: install/uninstall/status the SessionStart drift hook (--global vs --local), plus a defer-check exit-code probe.

children.title: memory.py
children.abstract: `context memory <verb>` CLI: session-memory store ops (session-start/roll/init/nudge/breadcrumb) for the memory hooks.

children.title: migrate.py
children.abstract: One-shot in-place migrations for older `.context/` layouts (pre-v0.10 graph/CLAUDE.md paths); called by refresh-indexes.

children.title: onboard.py
children.abstract: `context onboard` CLI: thin persistence of council preferences (scope/mode/model/hooks/docs) into config.json, plus a CI --defaults path.

children.title: plan_update.py
children.abstract: `context plan-update` CLI: prints a markdown drift summary of stale feature docs for Claude Code's SessionStart hook (always exit 0).

children.title: preflight.py
children.abstract: `context preflight` CLI: read-only inventory of .claude/.context/git ownership so a session knows what it'll touch vs leave alone.

children.title: propose.py
children.abstract: `context propose` CLI: scaffold a consistency-checked proposal via the proposals domain (ensure→scan→apply), print path + related features.

children.title: query.py
children.abstract: `context query` CLI: PageIndex-style retrieval over .context/features/ with --top-k/--budget/--json (markdown by default).

children.title: reality_check.py
children.abstract: `context reality-check --feature ID` CLI: fact-check docs vs the extraction graph; --demote/promote self-heals feature confidence.

children.title: rebuild.py
children.abstract: `context rebuild` CLI: re-run the deterministic backbone (map/tree/symbols); `--changed` for incremental, `--full` for a clean rebuild.

children.title: reconcile.py
children.abstract: `context reconcile` (read-only drift report) + `reconcile-stamp` (write boundary advancing the commit anchor; refuses on pending work).

children.title: reconcile_gate.py
children.abstract: `context reconcile-gate` CLI: Stop-hook gate that blocks session exit once when `.context/` is stale; always returns 0.

children.title: refresh.py
children.abstract: `context refresh-indexes` CLI: rebuild INDEX.md + features graph/index from disk after enrichment, running legacy-layout migration.

children.title: status.py
children.abstract: `context status` CLI: a single read-only overview composing enriched-index/drift/equipment/proposal/version helpers (markdown or JSON).

children.title: statusline.py
children.abstract: `context statusline` CLI: cold-path fallback echoing the cached `.context/` freshness badge; never recomputes drift, always exit 0.

children.title: context
children.abstract: The .context/ engine: lifecycle build/, renderers output/, behaviour domains/, plus drift/hooks/plugins/settings wiring for Claude Code

children.title: domains
children.abstract: Behaviour layer of the .context/ engine — one directory per domain (equip, features, memory, audit, proposals, …) owning its logic + models

children.title: audit
children.abstract: Audit-panel domain: scaffolds .context/audits/ workspaces, persona catalog, and the adversarial debate resumption log (workspace.py, catalog.py, log.py)

children.title: __init__.py
children.abstract: Audit domain package: deterministic scaffold + debate-log surface for the argue-and-audit panel; re-exports its dataclasses/ops/errors.

children.title: catalog.py
children.abstract: Load the shipped audit-persona catalog from markdown frontmatter and resolve each card's subagent_type against the installed roster.

children.title: enums.py
children.abstract: Closed audit-debate alphabet: the LogStatus enum + MAX_REBUTTAL_ROUNDS cap (effort/model dials reused from the council config).

children.title: errors.py
children.abstract: Typed exception hierarchy for the audit domain (AuditError base + slug/exists/not-found/model-required subclasses) mapped to CLI exit codes.

children.title: log.py
children.abstract: Debate-resumption log (`_debate-log.json`): appends per-(round, persona) audit entries so a partial argue-and-audit run resumes without redoing finished work.

children.title: models.py
children.abstract: Frozen dataclasses modeling the audit workspace head — AuditConfig (audit.json) and persona-card shapes; the auditing itself is the skill, not Python.

children.title: workspace.py
children.abstract: Scaffolds/reads `.context/audits/<slug>/` — slugify, traversal-safe validation, model/mode resolution, and atomic write of audit.json/description.md/catalog.json.

children.title: buildloop
children.abstract: Build-loop domain: parses and ticks wave-grouped checklists and maps checklist items to installed tools (checklist.py, mapping.py)

children.title: __init__.py
children.abstract: Empty package marker re-exporting the buildloop domain's public surface (checklist parse/flip, wave frontier, task→equipment mapping).

children.title: checklist.py
children.abstract: Deterministic state layer for a proposal's checklist.md: parse `- [ ]`/`- [x]` lines into grouped ChecklistItems and atomically tick/skip exactly one box.

children.title: errors.py
children.abstract: Single typed exception BuildLoopError raised when checklist parse/flip or task→equipment mapping can't safely complete; CLI maps it to exit 2.

children.title: mapping.py
children.abstract: Maps one checklist item to its best-fit equipment agent by deterministic keyword overlap (Capability lexicon), item-kind aware so incidental tokens never misroute work.

children.title: models.py
children.abstract: Frozen value objects for the build loop: ChecklistItem (index/done/group/gate/via) and Choice (the item→equipment mapping outcome with fallback semantics).

children.title: debt
children.abstract: Technical-debt ledger domain — harvests debt markers from the tree into a structured ledger (harvest.py, models.py)

children.title: __init__.py
children.abstract: Empty package marker for the technical-debt domain (harvest TODO/FIXME/HACK/DEBT markers into a deterministic ledger).

children.title: harvest.py
children.abstract: Pure read-only harvester: scans repo Python comments for TODO/FIXME/HACK/DEBT markers (parsing structured DEBT ceiling/trigger) into a deterministic DebtLedger.

children.title: models.py
children.abstract: Frozen, I/O-free dataclasses for the debt ledger — DebtRow (repo-relative POSIX path/line/marker/trigger) and DebtLedger with reproducible to_dict.

children.title: doc_reorg
children.abstract: Documentation reorganizer domain — discovers doc files and computes safe move/restructure plans (discovery.py, safety.py)

children.title: __init__.py
children.abstract: Empty package marker re-exporting the doc-reorg safety net (discover/guard/backup/restore); the destructive rewrite happens in-session, not here.

children.title: discovery.py
children.abstract: Discovers in-repo prose docs a reorg may touch by reusing source-docs discovery and expanding dirs into files — rewritable text formats only (md/mdx/rst/txt).

children.title: enums.py
children.abstract: Fixed alphabet for the doc-reorg CLI: DocReorgAction enum (GUARD/LIST/BACKUP/RESTORE).

children.title: errors.py
children.abstract: Typed errors for the doc-reorg flow: DocReorgError base → DirtyTreeError, BackupError, mapped by the CLI to exit codes.

children.title: models.py
children.abstract: Frozen dataclasses for the doc-reorg safety net: DocBackup (snapshot manifest) and RestoreResult (restored/skipped/created-since), both with to_dict.

children.title: safety.py
children.abstract: Doc-reorg safety machinery: refuse-on-dirty-tree gate, backup snapshot with manifest+gitignore, and honest atomic restore so git stays a complete undo.

children.title: equip
children.abstract: Project-equipment domain: renders/evolves a stack-tuned Claude toolkit and manages plugins — nests into generate/ plugins/ lifecycle/ wiring/

children.title: generate
children.abstract: Equip generation: detects stack, builds the specialist catalog, plans and renders agents/skills/specialists, adopts registry tools (catalog.py, render.py)

children.title: __init__.py
children.abstract: Empty package marker for equip's generate subpackage (detect/catalog/render/specialists/adopt/plan/proposal).

children.title: adopt.py
children.abstract: Resolves a capability set into generate-vs-adopt coverage by precedence (project agent → generated specialist → registry specialist), grounded in the preflight inventory.

children.title: catalog.py
children.abstract: Policy core: pure build_catalog over stack profile + conventions + preflight (+ proposal needs) deciding what equip generates, adopts, and wires.

children.title: detect.py
children.abstract: Deterministic stack+toolchain detection: tallies map/files.json languages into a StackProfile and derives formatter/test/lint/typecheck runners from manifest tokens.

children.title: plan.py
children.abstract: Renders a catalog decision into (item, rel_path, content) triples — the single render path apply/refresh/reset share, stamping version/origin-hash/subagent_type.

children.title: proposal.py
children.abstract: Pure extractor harvesting the specialist capabilities (db/security/frontend/performance/docs) a proposal's plan+checklist demand, feeding adopt-before-generate.

children.title: render.py
children.abstract: Fills shipped `*.md.tmpl` templates with project values ({{stack}}/{{proj}}/{{conventions}}…), located package-relative so rendering works pre- and post-install.

children.title: specialists.py
children.abstract: Defines the on-demand GENERATED specialist family (db/security/performance/docs/search) — each a SpecialistTemplate binding template, project-scoped name, and grounding docs.

children.title: lifecycle
children.abstract: Equip lifecycle: hash-baselined status/refresh/reset/uninstall and manifest tracking so generated tools evolve without clobbering user edits

children.title: __init__.py
children.abstract: Empty package marker for equip's lifecycle subpackage (hashing/manifest/status/refresh/reset/evolve/remove).

children.title: evolve.py
children.abstract: The sanctioned patch seam: exact-once old/new replacement on a generated tool, written atomically then re-baselined+version-bumped so it stays PRISTINE.

children.title: hashing.py
children.abstract: Content hashing for origin-hash baselines: sha256 of rendered bytes; equal⇒pristine (safe to refresh), different⇒user-modified (skip forever).

children.title: manifest.py
children.abstract: Atomic read/write of `.context/equipment.json` via tmp+rename so a crashed run never leaves a half-written manifest.

children.title: remove.py
children.abstract: Removes ONE manifest entry surgically by source (installed/marketplace/generated/vendored), un-wiring settings and never deleting files unless explicitly asked.

children.title: status.py
children.abstract: Hash-baselined lifecycle: classify_item (PRISTINE/USER_MODIFIED/MISSING) plus status/refresh/reset/uninstall driven by the origin-hash baseline.

children.title: plugins
children.abstract: Equip plugin manager: discovers marketplace/GitHub plugins, scores blast radius, and plans native installs into settings.json (discover.py, install_plan.py)

children.title: __init__.py
children.abstract: Empty package marker for equip's plugin-manager subpackage (marketplace/discover/blast-radius/install-plan/sources/vendor).

children.title: blast_radius.py
children.abstract: Pure blast-radius analysis: which surfaces a plugin declares and whether any run code (hooks/bin) — the safety spine of the install plan.

children.title: discover.py
children.abstract: Pure matching+ranking of discovered plugins against needed capabilities and/or a query via whole-word capability inference (no bare-substring false positives).

children.title: install_plan.py
children.abstract: Pure install-plan builder: classifies a candidate VENDORED vs NATIVE and gates any UNTRUSTED source behind explicit `--yes` approval.

children.title: marketplace.py
children.abstract: Pure marketplace catalog model: parses/validates a `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json` dict into frozen PluginEntry dataclasses at the boundary.

children.title: sources.py
children.abstract: The only equip module that shells out — probes tools, fetches marketplace catalogs, and searches GitHub behind an injectable Runner seam (never touches network in tests).

children.title: vendor.py
children.abstract: Pure VENDOR helpers: stamp a copied plugin file with the vendored sentinel and build its manifest item with origin+content hash (file write stays at the CLI boundary).

children.title: wiring
children.abstract: Equip wiring: installs the PostToolUse formatter hook into settings.json with safety guards (hooks.py, safety.py)

children.title: __init__.py
children.abstract: Empty package marker for equip's wiring subpackage (settings.json hook install + never-clobber safety).

children.title: hooks.py
children.abstract: Wires equip's PostToolUse format hook into `.claude/settings.json` keyed by EQUIP_SENTINEL — idempotent and preserve-or-refuse on unparseable settings.

children.title: safety.py
children.abstract: Never-clobber guard: is_safe_to_write returns True only when the target is absent or carries equip's GENERATED_SENTINEL, so a user-authored file is never overwritten.

children.title: __init__.py
children.abstract: Empty package marker for the equip domain (project-tuned toolkit generation, plugin management, hash-baselined lifecycle).

children.title: constants.py
children.abstract: Package-private equip constants: schema version (v4), the EQUIP_SENTINEL/VENDORED markers, and the shared capability keyword vocabulary.

children.title: enums.py
children.abstract: Closed alphabets for equip: EquipmentKind (agent/skill/command/hook/plugin), Capability, source/mechanism/trust-tier/plugin-surface enums.

children.title: errors.py
children.abstract: Typed equip error hierarchy (EquipError base → TemplateError/ResetError/PatchError/RemoveError…) the CLI maps to exit codes.

children.title: models.py
children.abstract: Frozen equip dataclasses (StackProfile, EquipmentItem, EquipmentManifest) plus the GENERATED_SENTINEL marker that tags equip's own output for safe regeneration.

children.title: features
children.abstract: Feature-taxonomy domain: clusters symbols into named features, builds per-feature docs/indexes, and handles placement/renames (builder.py, render.py)

children.title: __init__.py
children.abstract: Package init for the feature-taxonomy domain; re-exports the public scaffold/rename/merge/placement ops, models, and FeatureRenameError.

children.title: builder.py
children.abstract: Build-time `scaffold_features`: two deterministic passes turn the clustered call/community graph into per-feature folders and BFS flows.

children.title: constants.py
children.abstract: Package-private constants for the feature-taxonomy domain (schema version, merge sentinels, valid sections, docs top-N).

children.title: docs.py
children.abstract: Generates each feature's `docs.md` after scaffold, linking it to catalogued source-docs by name/file/symbol overlap as relative pointers.

children.title: errors.py
children.abstract: Defines `FeatureRenameError(ValueError)`, the shared exception every atomic feature/flow op raises and the CLI maps to exit 2.

children.title: helpers.py
children.abstract: Package-private helpers: slug validation, path/range utilities, atomic JSON/text writers, recursive removal, and docs-link reason ranking.

children.title: indexes.py
children.abstract: Rebuilds `features/INDEX.md` and `graph.{json,html}` from on-disk feature folders so top-level navigation stays in sync after enrichment.

children.title: models.py
children.abstract: Frozen dataclasses for the taxonomy: Feature/Flow/FlowStep plus the Scaffold/Rename/Merge/Remove/Placement result carriers.

children.title: ops.py
children.abstract: Atomic feature/flow ops — rename, merge, remove_flow, write_section — each validating fully before its first write or raising FeatureRenameError.

children.title: placement.py
children.abstract: Deterministic atomic placement ops (scaffold_feature, assign/unassign_files, remove_feature) that fold net-new files into the taxonomy without re-clustering.

children.title: render.py
children.abstract: Pure markdown stub renderers (feature spec, flow) and the denormalized HTML-viewer `_graph_view` payload builder; no I/O.

children.title: memory
children.abstract: Session-memory & drift domain: parses transcripts, rolls now→recent→archive, promotes core memories, and emits drift breadcrumbs/nudges

children.title: __init__.py
children.abstract: Package init for the session-memory domain — the markdown-first now/recent/archive/core store maintained by CLI mechanics, not prose.

children.title: breadcrumb.py
children.abstract: PreCompact breadcrumb: writes a deterministic, factual now.md entry (tagged AUTO_BREADCRUMB) before compaction so a session is never blank.

children.title: detect.py
children.abstract: Detects a co-installed `remember` plugin via `<root>/.remember/` so dummyindex stands down and avoids competing memory injections.

children.title: emit.py
children.abstract: Renders the read-only SessionStart memory block (handoff + memory, 4000-char cap); returns None when the remember plugin or empty store applies.

children.title: enums.py
children.abstract: Closed alphabet for the memory store: MemoryTier (now/recent/archive files), tier headings, and the AUTO_BREADCRUMB tag.

children.title: models.py
children.abstract: Frozen data carriers for the memory domain: the markdown `Section` and the roll-relocation `RollReport`.

children.title: nudge.py
children.abstract: Stop-hook handoff nudge: deterministically decides whether to prompt for a session handoff and renders the additionalContext payload.

children.title: parse.py
children.abstract: Markdown section helpers shared by tier files — split/join `## …` sections and parse section dates so roll can relocate them intact.

children.title: roll.py
children.abstract: Deterministic, idempotent roll: relocates dated now.md sections into recent.md and aged recent.md sections into archive.md.

children.title: store.py
children.abstract: Locates and idempotently creates the `.context/session-memory/` tier store and its empty tier stubs without clobbering existing files.

children.title: transcript.py
children.abstract: Stdlib-only reader of the live Claude Code session transcript for coarse signals (output tokens, subagents, turns) gating handoff nudges.

children.title: preflight
children.abstract: Preflight inventory & ownership domain — inventories the repo and computes file/feature ownership before a run (inventory.py, ownership.py)

children.title: __init__.py
children.abstract: Package init for the preflight domain; re-exports the read-only inventory entry point, markdown renderer, ownership probe, and report models.

children.title: inventory.py
children.abstract: Builds a read-only PreflightReport by inspecting `.claude/`, probing `.context/` ownership, and querying git clean-state; touches nothing.

children.title: models.py
children.abstract: Frozen dataclasses SettingsState and PreflightReport — the read-only snapshot of a repo's existing `.claude/`/git state before any write.

children.title: ownership.py
children.abstract: Classifies a `.context/` dir as ABSENT/OURS/FOREIGN via its meta.json dummyindex marker; tolerant — malformed non-empty dirs read FOREIGN, never raises.

children.title: render.py
children.abstract: Renders a PreflightReport as the markdown summary shown before writing: will-write / leave-untouched / warnings / state sections.

children.title: proposals
children.abstract: Proposal store domain: scans and persists .context/proposals/ artifacts (spec/plan/checklist) for the plan/build flow (scan.py, store.py)

children.title: __init__.py
children.abstract: Package init for the proposals domain — the `.context/proposals/<slug>/` planning-artifact store.

children.title: constants.py
children.abstract: Package-private constants for the proposals domain (SCHEMA_VERSION), kept out of enums as a tunable rather than a closed alphabet.

children.title: enums.py
children.abstract: Closed alphabet for the proposal lifecycle: ProposalStatus (planned/in_progress/done).

children.title: errors.py
children.abstract: Typed proposal-domain exceptions: ProposalError base plus ProposalExistsError and ProposalSlugError, mapped to CLI exit codes.

children.title: models.py
children.abstract: Frozen `Proposal` dataclass — the machine-readable head of a proposal folder (fields incl. forward-schema reused_symbols), with to_dict.

children.title: scan.py
children.abstract: Deterministic no-LLM consistency scan: reuses `query` to rank features a title touches and lists convention docs a plan should honor.

children.title: store.py
children.abstract: Reads/writes the on-disk proposal artifact: `ensure_proposal` atomically scaffolds proposal.json + spec/plan/checklist templates.

children.title: source_docs
children.abstract: Prose source-doc catalog domain: discovers, reads, key-indexes, and ref-checks existing project docs (catalog.py, refs.py, writers.py)

children.title: __init__.py
children.abstract: Package init for the source-docs domain; re-exports the doc-catalog builder, discovery, JSON-key harvest, and DocEntry/DocCatalog models.

children.title: catalog.py
children.abstract: `build_doc_catalog`: walks discovered docs, extracts code refs, and deterministically classifies each doc's confidence from broken-ref ratio + age.

children.title: constants.py
children.abstract: Package-private constants for source-docs grading: schema version, broken-ref/age thresholds, and the advisory banner text.

children.title: discovery.py
children.abstract: In-repo doc discovery: `discover_default_doc_paths` returns well-known files (README/CHANGELOG/docs/ADR/…) plus root-level markdown, deduped and sorted.

children.title: keys.py
children.abstract: `harvest_json_keys`: walks JSON schemas/payloads to collect property names so backticked refs matching a schema aren't flagged as broken.

children.title: models.py
children.abstract: Frozen DocEntry and DocCatalog dataclasses carrying per-doc signals (confidence, broken_refs, age_bucket, sha256, …) with to_dict serialization.

children.title: readers.py
children.abstract: `read_catalog`: loads a previously written `source-docs/INDEX.json` back into a DocCatalog, or None when absent.

children.title: refs.py
children.abstract: Reference extraction from doc prose: pulls backticked code refs, cross-checks them for broken ones against the symbol set, and parses titles/headings.

children.title: writers.py
children.abstract: Atomically writes the doc catalog: `source-docs/INDEX.json` plus the human-readable `INDEX.md` table with advisory banner and low-confidence section.

children.title: __init__.py
children.abstract: Domains package marker — see parent package docstring.

children.title: atomic_io.py
children.abstract: Shared domain I/O helper: byte-faithful atomic text write (tmp+replace) importable by any domain store without cross-domain coupling.

children.title: config.py
children.abstract: Per-repo council preferences `.context/config.json` — scope/mode/model/hook/external-docs choices only (never secrets); read/write + default baseline.

children.title: council.py
children.abstract: Council audit log + resumption helpers (`_council-log.json`): append/read entries, stage-completion checks, reset markers, and artifact backfill for pre-v0.20 indexes.

children.title: council_batch.py
children.abstract: Parallel-council batch frontier — deterministically computes the earliest incomplete stage across features and its dispatch units (CouncilStage/CouncilMode alphabet).

children.title: dev_pick.py
children.abstract: Stack-aware author picker: deterministic first-match-wins precedence table choosing which dev persona writes a feature's council docs, with a fallback agent ladder.

children.title: enrich.py
children.abstract: Plans and applies LLM tree-abstract enrichment: collects EXTRACTED stub nodes into per-file batches, then merges authored abstracts back, promoting EXTRACTED→INFERRED only.

children.title: query.py
children.abstract: PageIndex-style deterministic retrieval: scores every feature by token overlap and returns ranked, cited, token-budgeted matches; no LLM.

children.title: reality_check.py
children.abstract: Post-synthesis fact-checker: re-reads plan/concerns docs, extracts concrete grounding claims, and verifies each against the AST + symbol graph + source.

children.title: output
children.abstract: Renderers for the .context/ engine — emit bootstrap files, docs, agent instructions, and the PageIndex tree viewer (bootstrap.py, viewer.py)

children.title: __init__.py
children.abstract: Package init for the `context/output` rendering layer (bootstrap, INDEX/PROJECT docs, agent instructions, graph viewer).

children.title: bootstrap.py
children.abstract: Renders and idempotently regenerates the dummyindex-managed block in `.claude/CLAUDE.md`, owning one delimited region via atomic marker replace.

children.title: docs.py
children.abstract: Deterministically generates `.context/INDEX.md` and `PROJECT.md` from pyproject/package.json/README/meta and the source-doc catalog.

children.title: instructions.py
children.abstract: Pure generators for the agent-facing docs: HOW_TO_USE.md, architecture/overview.md, and the five static task playbooks — no LLM, no I/O.

children.title: viewer.py
children.abstract: Single VIEWER_HTML string: the interactive HTML graph viewer shipped beside features/graph.json (feature-grid + force-directed views).

children.title: __init__.py
children.abstract: context-engine package root: re-exports the build/output public surface (meta, tree, maps, conventions, bootstrap, incremental, docs).

children.title: claude_plugins.py
children.abstract: Wire marketplaces + plugins into .claude/settings.json (extraKnownMarketplaces/enabledPlugins) with preserve-or-refuse atomic writes + read helpers.

children.title: claude_settings.py
children.abstract: Shared .claude/settings.json hook machinery: load/install/remove hook entries + atomic write, with preserve-or-refuse and sentinel idempotency.

children.title: default_plugins.py
children.abstract: Wire dummyindex's default Claude Code plugins (today: superpowers) into a repo's settings.json at init; never raises, reports in result.

children.title: drift.py
children.abstract: Drift engine behind the SessionStart refresh signal: reports features whose source mtime is newer than their `.context/` docs so the session can reconcile.

children.title: enums.py
children.abstract: Cross-area `.context/` enums shared by multiple modules — notably DocConfidence and its DOC_CONFIDENCE_ORDER.

children.title: hooks.py
children.abstract: Installs the three Claude Code session hooks — SessionStart drift+memory, Stop handoff nudge, and PreCompact breadcrumb — into settings.json.

children.title: reconcile_gate.py
children.abstract: Stop-hook reconcile gate: deterministically blocks session exit once (root + submodules) when a substantive session left .context/ stale; never stamps.

children.title: export
children.abstract: Transport layer: renders the in-memory symbol graph to on-disk JSON (graph.py:to_json) — graph → bytes

children.title: __init__.py
children.abstract: Graph-export package init: re-exports to_json for the lazy __getattr__ map and context/build/graph.py.

children.title: common.py
children.abstract: Shared graph-export helpers: confidence-score defaults, node→community inversion, diacritic stripping.

children.title: graph.py
children.abstract: to_json: writes a NetworkX node-link symbol-graph.json tagging each node with community/norm_label and backfilling link confidence scores.

children.title: installer
children.abstract: Install surface: wires the CLI, skills, hooks, and per-repo .context/ scaffolding into a target, plus uninstall (install.py, uninstall.py, args.py)

children.title: __init__.py
children.abstract: Installer package facade: re-exports parse_install_args, install, uninstall, and version/skill path constants for the thin __main__ dispatcher.

children.title: args.py
children.abstract: Flag parsing shared by `dummyindex install` / `uninstall` (scope, dir, skill-only, defaults), with usage text.

children.title: common.py
children.abstract: Shared installer constants (PACKAGE_VERSION, skill/command paths) plus bundled slash-command copy/remove helpers.

children.title: install.py
children.abstract: `dummyindex install`: copies the skill family into the scope, then auto-inits a git repo (build/refresh .context/, CLAUDE.md, hooks, default plugins) — idempotent, non-destructive.

children.title: uninstall.py
children.abstract: `dummyindex uninstall`: removes the installed skill tree, slash commands, and version stamp from the chosen user/project scope.

children.title: pipeline
children.abstract: Deterministic backbone: tree-sitter extraction plus IO (cache/detect/git) feeding structure and the symbol graph

children.title: extract
children.abstract: Tree-sitter extraction core: per-language configs, import/symbol resolution, and generic fallback extractors (resolve.py, imports.py, generic.py)

children.title: languages
children.abstract: Per-language tree-sitter extractors — one module each for Go, Rust, Dart, Elixir, Julia, PowerShell, Verilog, Zig, Blade, etc.

children.title: __init__.py
children.abstract: Per-language extractor package: re-exports each extract_<lang> for the suffix dispatch table.

children.title: blade.py
children.abstract: Regex-based Blade (Laravel template) extractor: @include / <livewire:> / wire: bindings become includes / uses_component / binds_method edges.

children.title: dart.py
children.abstract: Regex-based Dart extractor: catches class / mixin / function definitions and import statements (no tree-sitter-dart bundled).

children.title: elixir.py
children.abstract: Tree-sitter custom-walk Elixir extractor: modules, functions, macros, behaviours, and use/alias/import directives become nodes + edges.

children.title: go.py
children.abstract: Tree-sitter custom-walk Go extractor: packages, types, functions, receiver-based methods, imports, and calls become nodes + edges.

children.title: julia.py
children.abstract: Tree-sitter custom-walk Julia extractor: modules, structs, functions, imports, and calls become nodes + edges.

children.title: powershell.py
children.abstract: Tree-sitter custom-walk PowerShell extractor: functions, classes, methods, parameters, and dot-sourced imports become nodes + edges.

children.title: rust.py
children.abstract: Tree-sitter custom-walk Rust extractor: modules, structs, traits, impl blocks, functions, methods, and use statements become nodes + edges.

children.title: verilog.py
children.abstract: Tree-sitter custom-walk Verilog/SystemVerilog extractor: modules, functions, tasks, package imports, and module instantiations become nodes + edges.

children.title: wrappers.py
children.abstract: Thin per-language wrappers handing a LanguageConfig to _extract_generic; Python adds the docstring + rationale-comment post-pass.

children.title: zig.py
children.abstract: Tree-sitter custom-walk Zig extractor: functions, structs, enums, errors, and imports become nodes + edges.

children.title: __init__.py
children.abstract: Extraction package: public extract()/collect_files() surface and the suffix→language dispatch that runs the deterministic tree-sitter pipeline.

children.title: common.py
children.abstract: Shared AST-extraction building blocks: _make_id (stable node id), _read_text, _find_body — used by every language extractor.

children.title: config.py
children.abstract: LanguageConfig dataclass: declares per-grammar quirks (node-type sets, name/body fields, call accessors, import/resolve callables) driving _extract_generic.

children.title: generic.py
children.abstract: _extract_generic: the ~600-line parametric tree-sitter driver (~12 languages) emitting class/function/method nodes, import edges, and a second-pass call graph.

children.title: helpers.py
children.abstract: Per-language name-resolution and grammar-quirk helpers: C/C++ declarator unwrapping and _<lang>_extra_walk passes for arrow functions, namespaces, enum cases.

children.title: imports.py
children.abstract: Per-language _import_<lang> handlers: read an import node, compute the target id, and append the import edge; dispatched via LanguageConfig.import_handler.

children.title: language_configs.py
children.abstract: Frozen LanguageConfig instances, one per generic-extractor language, binding a tree-sitter grammar to its class/function/import/call node types.

children.title: python_rationale.py
children.abstract: Python post-pass: adds rationale nodes (one per docstring + NOTE/TODO/etc. comment) and rationale_for edges; defines shared DEBT_PREFIXES.

children.title: resolve.py
children.abstract: Cross-file import resolvers (Python, Java): upgrade file-level imports into class-level INFERRED edges by re-parsing referenced classes.

children.title: io
children.abstract: Pipeline IO: language detection, git metadata, and extraction caching (detect.py, git.py, cache.py)

children.title: __init__.py
children.abstract: Filesystem-IO package facade: re-exports cache, detect, and git helpers so callers import them from one place.

children.title: cache.py
children.abstract: Content-hash extraction cache: SHA256-keyed per-file JSON under .context/cache so re-runs skip unchanged files (Markdown hashes body below frontmatter).

children.title: detect.py
children.abstract: File-type detection (FileType code/document/image) plus document extraction (PDF / DOCX / XLSX → text) and corpus-health checks.

children.title: git.py
children.abstract: Pure-filesystem git-repo detection (submodule/worktree aware): reads .git dir/file without shelling out; malformed input is 'not a repo', never raises.

children.title: __init__.py
children.abstract: Pipeline package init: docstring marker for the detection / extraction / validation / export modules.

children.title: enums.py
children.abstract: Pipeline enums: the ConfidenceLevel (str, Enum) closed-alphabet constant set used across the deterministic backbone (3.10-compatible).

children.title: skills
children.abstract: Bundled non-Python assets shipped with the tool — Claude skill scripts (currently the statusline skill)

children.title: statusline
children.abstract: Context-freshness statusline scripts for Claude Code — shell + PowerShell variants (statusline.sh, statusline.ps1)

children.title: __init__.py
children.abstract: Skills package init: docstring marker for the packaged skill markdown files used by platform installers.

children.title: usage
children.abstract: Transcript token-usage reporting (stdlib-only): parse transcripts, aggregate, and render per-session/total token reports (transcripts.py, aggregate.py)

children.title: __init__.py
children.abstract: Usage package: `dummyindex usage` token-reporting facade over Claude Code JSONL transcripts; stdlib-only, bottom of the layering table.

children.title: aggregate.py
children.abstract: Pure roll-ups over TurnUsage records into per-chat/day/month/session/5h-block frozen buckets; no I/O, no printing.

children.title: enums.py
children.abstract: Usage enums: closed-alphabet (str, Enum) constants for report kinds so they round-trip through CLI args (3.10-compatible).

children.title: errors.py
children.abstract: Typed UsageError exception: raised inside the usage area and translated to a stderr line + exit code at the CLI boundary.

children.title: models.py
children.abstract: Frozen data carriers for token-usage reporting (TurnUsage and rolled-up buckets) — data only; arithmetic lives in aggregate.py.

children.title: render.py
children.abstract: Pure render functions: frozen usage buckets in, formatted display strings out (tables, TOTAL rows, ACTIVE marker); printing happens at the CLI.

children.title: report.py
children.abstract: Single CLI-facing entry point: locate transcripts, aggregate, and render a usage report to a string — no print/exit/env reads, for testability.

children.title: transcripts.py
children.abstract: The usage area's only I/O module: streams ~/.claude/projects JSONL line-by-line into TurnUsage records, deduplicating rewritten/forked turns by message.id+requestId.

children.title: __init__.py
children.abstract: Package root: narrow public API exposing the deterministic pipeline + clustering via lazy __getattr__ so `install` stays import-light.

children.title: __main__.py
children.abstract: Thin CLI entrypoint dispatching the top-level commands (install/uninstall/ingest/context/usage) to installer + context surfaces.

children.title: scripts
children.abstract: Repo tooling scripts run outside the package — the release automation script (release.py)

children.title: release.py
children.abstract: Conventional-commit release driver (replaces release-please): derives the semver bump, bumps pyproject + CHANGELOG, emits outputs; pure, git side effects live in the workflow.

children.title: tests
children.abstract: Test suite mirroring the package layout — cli/, context/, pipeline/, usage/, eval/, plus shared fixtures

children.title: cli
children.abstract: Tests for the wire-only CLI dispatchers — one test module per subcommand (~21 files)

children.title: test_audit_dir.py
children.abstract: Test: `audit show --json` (and start) exposes a repo-root-relative `dir` key pointing at the real .context/audits/<slug>/ workspace.

children.title: test_check_versions.py
children.abstract: Tests for `dummyindex context check --versions`: detection-only multi-layer skew report across CLI / skill stamp / meta.json / PATH-shadowing venv, always exit 0.

children.title: test_cli.py
children.abstract: Tests for the dummyindex.cli dispatch: empty argv prints usage and other context-CLI dispatch behaviours.

children.title: test_cli_doc_sync.py
children.abstract: Docs-sync guard tests: every ContextSubcommand enum value must appear in `context --help`, `docs/guide/07-cli.md`, and `dummyindex --help`.

children.title: test_debt_cli.py
children.abstract: CLI-boundary tests for `context debt`: default stdout ledger, `--write` to `.context/debt.md`, `--json` shape, no-debt message, repo-relative rows, tally.

children.title: test_debt_statusline_dispatch.py
children.abstract: Wiring tests proving `debt` + `statusline` subcommands are registered in `_HANDLERS`/dispatch, answer `--help`, and route end-to-end (exit 0).

children.title: test_equip_verb_required.py
children.abstract: Guard tests: bare `equip` (no verb) prints usage and exits 2 without mutating the repo; only explicit `equip apply` may write.

children.title: test_hooks_cli.py
children.abstract: Tests for `context hooks` CLI: `--global`/`--local` install scopes and the `defer-check` probe exit-code contract (1=no install, 0=defer).

children.title: test_ingest_command.py
children.abstract: Tests for the top-level `dummyindex ingest` CLI command, run as a subprocess against the sample-repo fixture.

children.title: test_init_cli.py
children.abstract: Tests for `context init`/`ingest` enriched-index guard: a first-build refuses to overwrite an already-enriched index unless `--force`.

children.title: test_plan_update_badge.py
children.abstract: Badge-write boundary tests for `context plan-update`: writes `compute_badge` to the gitignored cache best-effort, creates the dir, swallows write failures, still prints report and returns 0.

children.title: test_rebuild_cli.py
children.abstract: Tests for `context rebuild`: bare rebuild refuses a curated index (exit 2), `--full` is the explicit re-cluster escape hatch, `--changed` routes to non-destructive refresh.

children.title: test_reconcile_gate_cli.py
children.abstract: Tests for the `context reconcile-gate` CLI wrapper: it reads Stop-hook stdin, resolves the transcript, and prints the block payload.

children.title: test_reconcile_gate_e2e.py
children.abstract: End-to-end test: the `reconcile-gate` CLI emits a Stop-hook block over a drifted repo (feature source newer than its docs).

children.title: test_scope_vs_root.py
children.abstract: Tests for scope-vs-output-root decoupling: `resolve_context_root` writes `.context/`/`CLAUDE.md` to the repo root, not a scoped subdir.

children.title: test_status.py
children.abstract: Tests for `context status`: a read-only summary (enriched verdict, drift, equipment, proposals) that never mutates and exits 0 even on an un-indexed repo.

children.title: test_statusline.py
children.abstract: Tests for the cold-path `context statusline`: reads the shared badge cache and prints it, collapsing every error/missing-cache to empty stdout exit 0, never recomputing drift.

children.title: test_subcommand_help.py
children.abstract: Guard tests: every context subcommand answers `-h`/`--help` with exit 0 and a non-empty usage block, writing nothing to disk.

children.title: test_update_skill_doc.py
children.abstract: Docs-consistency guards reading the shipped `/dummyindex-update` SKILL.md: it must not prescribe the destructive path nor point verification at a missing file.

children.title: test_usage_errors.py
children.abstract: Tests that mandatory-flag / unknown-arg errors append the `run \`...--help\` for usage` pointer via `cli.common.usage_error`.

children.title: context
children.abstract: Tests for the .context/ engine — its domains, renderers, and build lifecycle

children.title: domains
children.abstract: Tests for the context behaviour domains, organized to mirror context/domains/ (audit, equip, features, memory, debt, …)

children.title: audit
children.abstract: Tests for the audit-panel domain — workspace scaffolding, persona catalog, debate log

children.title: __init__.py
children.abstract: Empty package marker for the `tests/context/domains/audit/` test package.

children.title: test_audit_cli.py
children.abstract: CLI dispatch tests for `context audit` and `audit-log`: workspace scaffold, persona catalog resolution, and debate-log entries.

children.title: test_audit_domain.py
children.abstract: Unit + integration tests for the `context.audit` domain: workspace scaffold, persona-card parsing, roster resolution, and debate-log resume.

children.title: debt
children.abstract: Tests for the technical-debt ledger domain — debt harvesting

children.title: __init__.py
children.abstract: Empty package marker for the `tests/context/domains/debt/` test package.

children.title: test_harvest.py
children.abstract: Unit tests for the `context.debt` harvester: Python-only marker enumeration, structured `# DEBT:` parse, `no_trigger` tagging, repo-relative paths, deterministic ordering.

children.title: equip
children.abstract: Tests for the project-equipment domain — generation, plugins, lifecycle, and wiring (~21 files)

children.title: __init__.py
children.abstract: Empty package marker for the `tests/context/domains/equip/` test package.

children.title: test_equip.py
children.abstract: Tests for `context equip`: templates-first rendering of the project-tuned toolkit (implementer/tester/reviewer agents, verify skill) and project slug.

children.title: test_equip_adopt.py
children.abstract: Tests for equip adoption: pure, write-free derivation that prefers project agents then the known-specialist registry, satisfying each capability at most once.

children.title: test_equip_apply_merge.py
children.abstract: Regression tests: `equip apply`/`add-specialist` must MERGE with the prior manifest, never silently dropping marketplace/vendored/adopted records.

children.title: test_equip_blast_radius.py
children.abstract: Pure tests for `analyze_blast_radius`: classifying a plugin's risk (inert vs code-running) for the trust-gated disclosure.

children.title: test_equip_canary.py
children.abstract: Tests for the invariant canary: a USER_MODIFIED file keeping all invariants is CUSTOMIZED; a missing invariant is INVARIANT_BROKEN.

children.title: test_equip_catalog.py
children.abstract: Tests for the pure `build_catalog` policy core: fixed generated set, format hook iff formatter detected, adoption covering proposal-capability gaps before fallback.

children.title: test_equip_discover.py
children.abstract: Pure tests for plugin discovery: `capabilities_for` and `match_candidates` capability matching + ranking of marketplace candidates.

children.title: test_equip_discover_cli.py
children.abstract: CLI tests for `equip discover` + `install` behind a fake `gh api` runner (no live network), keyed per-repo by marketplace.json name.

children.title: test_equip_e2e.py
children.abstract: End-to-end test walking the full equip v2 lifecycle through the CLI: build, apply, hand-edit (USER_MODIFIED), refresh-skip, patch, uninstall.

children.title: test_equip_evolve.py
children.abstract: Tests for the patch seam `apply_patch`: exact-once old/new replacement, atomic write, re-baseline + patch-version bump keeping the file PRISTINE.

children.title: test_equip_install_plan.py
children.abstract: Pure tests for `build_install_plan`: native vs vendor install mechanism selection and approval gating.

children.title: test_equip_lifecycle.py
children.abstract: Tests for the hash-baselined lifecycle: origin-hash PRISTINE/USER_MODIFIED/MISSING verdicts and `refresh`/`reset`/`uninstall` semantics.

children.title: test_equip_lifecycle_plugins.py
children.abstract: Lifecycle (status/uninstall) coverage for MARKETPLACE + VENDORED manifest items.

children.title: test_equip_manifest_v3.py
children.abstract: Tests for EquipmentItem schema v3 origin fields and round-trip back-compat with v2 manifests.

children.title: test_equip_marketplace.py
children.abstract: Pure tests for marketplace-catalog parsing + validation, including the seeded marketplaces and `CatalogError` cases.

children.title: test_equip_remove.py
children.abstract: Regression tests for `equip remove NAME`: surgical single-entry removal with source-keyed policy (INSTALLED drops record, MARKETPLACE un-wires, file-backed refuses without `--delete-file`).

children.title: test_equip_sources.py
children.abstract: Tests for discovery I/O behind a fake Runner (no live network): `available_tools`, `fetch_catalog`, `fetch_file`.

children.title: test_equip_specialist_invariants.py
children.abstract: Tests that the renderer sets a generated specialist's `invariants` manifest metadata to convention substrings guaranteed to appear verbatim in its body.

children.title: test_equip_specialists.py
children.abstract: Tests for the GENERATED specialist family (db/security/performance/docs/search): capability-keyed templates rendered + hash-baselined like the core four, with manifest-only fallback.

children.title: test_equip_vendor.py
children.abstract: Pure tests for vendoring helpers: `stamp_vendored` and `vendored_item` manifest-record construction.

children.title: features
children.abstract: Tests for the feature-taxonomy domain — clustering, doc building, and placement

children.title: __init__.py
children.abstract: Empty package marker for the `tests/context/domains/features/` test package.

children.title: test_features.py
children.abstract: Tests for the feature taxonomy engine + `features-rename` CLI: community/flow scaffolding, schema, HTML viewer emission, atomic rename across every JSON reference.

children.title: test_placement.py
children.abstract: Tests for atomic placement ops (`scaffold-feature`/`assign-files`) and their CLI front-ends: fold net-new files into the taxonomy without re-clustering, validate-before-write atomicity.

children.title: memory
children.abstract: Tests for the session-memory & drift domain — transcript parsing, rolling, and nudges

children.title: __init__.py
children.abstract: Empty package marker for the `tests/context/domains/memory/` test package.

children.title: test_breadcrumb.py
children.abstract: Tests for the PreCompact deterministic breadcrumb that appends a session marker into the memory store.

children.title: test_memory.py
children.abstract: Unit tests for the session-memory domain: tiers, sections, and roll/init mechanics of the now/recent/archive/core store.

children.title: test_memory_cli.py
children.abstract: Integration tests for the `dummyindex context memory` CLI verbs (session-start, roll, init, nudge, breadcrumb).

children.title: test_nudge.py
children.abstract: Tests the Stop-hook memory nudge: decide_nudge fires only on significant, un-saved, not-yet-nudged sessions.

children.title: test_transcript.py
children.abstract: Tests the session-transcript reader's edited-source signal (Write/Edit file_path collection) that the reconcile gate uses to attribute drift.

children.title: __init__.py
children.abstract: Empty package marker for the `tests/context/domains/` test package.

children.title: test_atomic_io.py
children.abstract: Tests the shared atomic write helpers (write_text_atomic, normalize_eof_newline) used across the session-memory domain.

children.title: test_build_loop.py
children.abstract: Tests the buildloop domain: checklist parse, wave frontier, item classify (gate/via/subagent), atomic check/skip, counts.

children.title: test_build_loop_routing.py
children.abstract: Tests build-loop equipment routing: map_task_to_equipment, equipped-gate, and per-item dispatch-mode classification.

children.title: test_config.py
children.abstract: Tests v0.14 onboarding config (.context/config.json) — domain round-trip plus the `onboard` and `config show` CLI handlers.

children.title: test_council_batch.py
children.abstract: Tests the council batch frontier: active_stages, earliest_incomplete_stage, next_batch dispatch units, force_recouncil.

children.title: test_council_batch_cli.py
children.abstract: Tests the `council-batch --next` CLI: stage/unit output, --json shape, scoping, and the curated-clobber stderr warning.

children.title: test_council_cli.py
children.abstract: Tests the v0.7 council CLI helpers — flow-remove, section-write, and council-log append/backfill.

children.title: test_dev_pick.py
children.abstract: Tests the council dev-stage persona picker: first-match precedence over file list + dep tokens, with a fallback ladder.

children.title: test_doc_reorg.py
children.abstract: Tests the doc-reorg safety net: refuse-on-dirty guard, backup snapshot+manifest, honest restore, created-file reporting, traversal refusal.

children.title: test_enrich.py
children.abstract: Tests the tree-enrich domain: build_plan stub collection/batching and apply_updates abstract merge with EXTRACTED→INFERRED promotion.

children.title: test_preflight.py
children.abstract: Tests the read-only `context preflight` setup inventory: .claude/.context ownership probe, git clean-state, markdown/JSON report.

children.title: test_propose.py
children.abstract: Tests the proposal store: scaffold of four files, consistency scan (related features + conventions), re-run/--force safety.

children.title: test_query.py
children.abstract: Tests `dummyindex context query` — the PageIndex-style retrieval over the frozen SAMPLE_REPO index.

children.title: test_reality_check.py
children.abstract: Tests `context reality-check`: verifies claims against a handcrafted .context/ skeleton (built without the full feature scaffolder).

children.title: test_source_docs.py
children.abstract: Tests the source-docs catalog + staleness model: broken-ref detection demotes a doc citing a vanished class.

children.title: output
children.abstract: Tests for the .context/ renderers — bootstrap, docs, instructions, viewer

children.title: __init__.py
children.abstract: Empty package marker for the tests/context/output test package.

children.title: test_bootstrap.py
children.abstract: Tests the CLAUDE.md managed-block writer (context.output.bootstrap) that bootstrap wires into a project at init.

children.title: test_docs.py
children.abstract: Tests the INDEX.md and PROJECT.md generators (context.output.docs), including source-doc-fed project description.

children.title: test_instructions.py
children.abstract: Tests the agent-instruction generators — HOW_TO_USE.md, architecture, and playbook markdown (context.output.instructions).

children.title: test_refresh_indexes.py
children.abstract: Tests `context refresh-indexes`: regenerates top-level INDEX.md after the skill renames community-N feature folders so links don't 404.

children.title: __init__.py
children.abstract: Empty package marker for the `tests/context/` test package.

children.title: test_claude_plugins.py
children.abstract: Tests wiring marketplaces + enabledPlugins into .claude/settings.json (add_marketplace, enable/disable_plugin).

children.title: test_claude_settings.py
children.abstract: Tests the shared .claude/settings.json hook machinery: preserve-or-refuse reader, idempotent sentinel-keyed installer, atomic writer.

children.title: test_default_plugins.py
children.abstract: Tests default-plugin wiring (context.default_plugins): idempotent declaration into settings.json + best-effort materialisation.

children.title: test_drift.py
children.abstract: Tests the SessionStart drift detector and `plan-update` CLI: source-newer-than-docs detection with mtime/sha decay.

children.title: test_hooks.py

children.title: test_reconcile_gate.py

children.title: eval

children.title: web

children.abstract: Repo packaging-hygiene guards: fail on git-tracked egg-info/build dirs and secret-shaped placeholders in shipped skill prose.
